name: Beanie Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter an 8-inch square pan and line with waxed paper, also buttering the paper.
2. Process tepary beans in a food processor until smooth.
3. In a large bowl, mix processed beans with remaining ingredients.
4. Spread mixture into prepared baking dish.
5. Bake at 325°F for 30-35 minutes.
6. Cool before removing from pan.
7. Peel off waxed paper and cut into squares.
